name: tenable
_name_lesson: The vulnerability NAME sits on the line(s) immediately BEFORE the VULNERABILITY header — the walk-back pulls it into the block it names (mirror image of the OpenVAS NVT lesson). Wrapped names span up to 2 lines and never end with sentence punctuation; previous-block body content usually does.

pair._lesson: A finding appears as TWO consecutive blocks — Base (Description/Solution/Risk/Plugin Details) and 'Name Instances (N)' (per-URL evidence). Pairing them is structure, not deduplication: it always runs.
